name: font-readable-size
desc: Increase the two LOGH VII UI font size sources after the Pretendard face patches. Primary GDI UI cache: FUN_004ea180 passes size 0x0c to FUN_004aec10, later consumed by FUN_004aec70 -> CreateFontA(-MulDiv(size,dpi,72)). Patch 12 -> 18. D3D texture-glyph atlas: FUN_004b07c0 computes uVar4=(LOGPIXELSY*10)/72 & 0xfffe, which is 12 at 96 DPI, stores it at atlas+0x60/+0x64, and derives the glyph cell from it. Patch the 5-byte even-mask to add 5 instead, yielding 18 at 96 DPI while keeping the existing atlas cell rounding path. Same-length immediate/code replacement only; needs live screenshot verification for clipping in compact edit boxes and buttons.
verified: Raw bytes verified against G7MTClient.korean.exe, vanilla ghidra reference, and canonical playable references: primary site file 0x000ea1c6 = 6a0c; atlas site file 0x000b0869 = 25feff0000. Same-length immediate/code replacement only. The 18px-ish bytes supersede the prior 16px-ish default after the user reported the font still looked too small.

patches.note: FUN_004ea180 -> FUN_004aec10 primary GDI UI font size: 12 -> 18.
FUN_004b07c0 atlas size result: replace `and eax,0xfffe` with `add eax,5; nop; nop`, so 96DPI atlas height becomes 18 instead of 12 and the existing cell rounding path remains intact.
